text: How do I track my order? After placing an order you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking link. You can also log in to your account, go to Orders, and click 'Track' next to your order to see real-time delivery updates.

What is the refund policy? We offer a full 30-day no-questions-asked refund policy. If you are not completely satisfied with your purchase, contact us within 30 days of delivery and we will process a refund to your original payment method within 5-7 business days.

How do I cancel my subscription? To cancel your subscription, log in to your account, navigate to Settings > Subscription, and click 'Cancel Subscription'. Your access will remain active until the end of the current billing period. You will not be charged again after cancellation.

What payment methods do you accept? We accept all major credit and debit cards (Visa, Mastercard, American Express), PayPal, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and bank transfers. All transactions are secured with 256-bit SSL encryption.

How long does shipping take? Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Express shipping (2-3 business days) and overnight delivery are also available at checkout. International orders may take 10-21 business days depending on the destination country and customs processing.

How do I update my account email address? Log in to your account and go to Settings > Account Details. Click 'Edit' next to your current email address, enter the new email, and confirm the change via the verification link we send to your new address.

How do I contact customer support? You can reach our support team 24/7 via live chat on our website, by emailing support@store.example.com, or by calling 1-800-555-0199 (Mon–Fri, 9 AM–6 PM EST). You can also submit a ticket through your account dashboard.

How do I apply a discount or promo code? At checkout, look for the 'Promo Code' or 'Discount Code' field on the order summary page. Enter your code and click 'Apply'. The discount will be deducted from your total automatically. Codes cannot be combined with other offers unless stated.
